title: Snuggle Vault
description: Adds a snuggle vault to store plushies in and machines with games to get plushies out
body:
# Snuggle Vault
Adds Machines for plushie storage
This mod was made for Modfest - Carnival! Huge thanks to the Modfest team for hosting this whole event! :D

## Features
### Snuggle Vault
- Store plushies
- Game machines can be attached and tickets using the pass from terrific tickets can be transferred as a cost
- Creative varient which doesn't remove items when it dispenses items

### Gacha Machine
- Displays a few items from beneath snuggle vault
- Has a lever to spend one token in exchange for one of the randomly displayed items

## Planned Features
- Claw Machine
- Plushies (Currently use another mod for plushies or other items for prizes)
